name: Can she fix you?
description:
Where there is depression she can fix you, maybe... I remember when I was feeling depressed and almost ended my life when my academic performance tanked. I cried and experienced first hand suicidal tendencies. But throughout my spiralling there was this girl who stayed with me through it.

TW: Mentions of suicide, depression and some other mental health things that user might say they have.

I was sad, but I didn't cry. The only time i cried was when we could never meet again. Her real name won't be used (Because doxxing reasons) but the full name of the character is an anagram.

(Depressed User) X (I can fix them girl)

Artist Link: https://pin.it/O10cabwvd
creator: setyurs
